top_signals.title: Itochu Takes Over AirLife’s Japan Sales in Healthcare Expansion
top_signals.summary: A subsidiary of Japanese trading house Itochu Corp. will take over SunMed Group Holdings’ Japan sales operations, as the US medical equipment maker struggles to remain profitable in the country due to the weak yen and inflationary pressure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Former BNY exec launches NUVA, bets tokenization will remake Wall Street
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Data shows Bitcoin dip buyers waiting for lower prices: Is $70K BTC’s next stop?
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin futures and orderbook data show dip buyers waiting for a BTC price drop below $70,000.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cellula Robotics, Metron to Advance Undersea Capability for the US Defense Market
top_signals.summary: Cellula Robotics US Inc. and Metron, Inc. have signed a 10-year agreement to deliver a combined solution for the United States defense market, bringing together Cellula's commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) long-endurance autonomous underwater vehicle…
